title: Exercises: Disaster Recovery for Quantum Systems

exercises.title: Design DR Plan with Dependencies
exercises.description: Create a comprehensive disaster recovery plan for a quantum chemistry application.
tasks: Define 6 services with their RTO and RPO requirements
Map service dependencies to create a dependency graph
Calculate the critical path and overall RTO
Determine optimal recovery order using topological sort
Generate a complete DR plan document
exercises.expectedOutput: DisasterRecoveryPlanner with complete service configuration and generated plan
hints: Chemistry applications depend on result storage, VQE optimizer, and backend access
Consider which services are stateless vs stateful

exercises.title: Implement Incremental Backup System
exercises.description: Build an incremental backup system that minimizes storage and backup time.
tasks: Implement change detection to identify modified circuits since last backup
Create incremental backup that only stores changes
Implement restore that combines full + incremental backups
Add backup chain validation to detect missing incrementals
Calculate storage savings compared to full backups only
exercises.expectedOutput: IncrementalBackupSystem with change tracking and chain restoration
hints: Track last modified timestamp or hash for each item
Incremental restore requires finding the base full backup
Consider how to handle deleted items

exercises.title: Build Automated Failover Controller
exercises.description: Create an automated failover controller with health-based triggering.
tasks: Implement continuous health monitoring for all failover targets
Create automatic failover trigger based on consecutive health check failures
Add configurable thresholds for failover sensitivity
Implement gradual traffic shifting during failover
Create alerting for failover events
exercises.expectedOutput: AutomatedFailoverController with health monitoring and gradual traffic shifting
hints: Use a sliding window of health check results to avoid false positives
Gradual traffic shifting reduces impact of failover issues
Consider implementing a circuit breaker pattern for health checks

exercises.title: Create DR Testing Framework
exercises.description: Build a framework for automated DR testing with reporting.
tasks: Create a test scheduler for regular DR tests
Implement pre-test validation checks
Build test result recording with pass/fail criteria
Generate compliance-ready test reports
Add recommendations based on test results
exercises.expectedOutput: DRTestingFramework with scheduling, execution, and reporting
hints: Tests should be non-destructive to production data
Include both failover and backup/restore tests
Track test trends over time to identify degradation
